creator: ady@warpnet.ro
text:
Hi,

On Sun, 24 May 1998, Steve Price wrote:

> Synopsis: imap-uw port is out of date / won't compile
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: steve
> State-Changed-When: Sun May 24 20:17:58 PDT 1998
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Port updated, thanks!  Let me know if you are still interested
> in maintaining this port.

 Yes, I am!
 I've replied to your messages but it seems (?) they didn't make it to
you...

 Just two things:
 * If it is possible please use <imap-uw@freebsd.ady.ro> as the mainainer
   address.
 * I would like to know what the proceedings are for submitting updates
   for the port, and where should I look for documentation regarding port
   maintainance (until now I've spotted a section in the Handbook about
   this).

> 

 Adrian Penisoara
 Ady (@warpnet.ro)
